dev.jeka.core.api.tooling.intellij

Class JkImlGenerator

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.tooling.intellij.JkImlGenerator

  • public final class JkImlGenerator
extends java.lang.Object
    Provides method to generate and read Eclipse metadata files.
